A minimal Kanban board management API built with FastAPI and Pydantic.

## Features

- Create, view, and delete boards
- Create, view, update, and delete tasks
- Filter tasks by tags
- View board statistics (todo/doing/done counts)

## Business Rules

- A board must exist before tasks can be created on it
- A task can have at most 5 tags
- Tags must be unique within a task
- A `done` task cannot change its title
- Deleting a board cascade-deletes its tasks
- Filtering by a missing tag returns an empty list, not an error

## API Endpoints

- `POST /boards` - Create a new board
- `GET /boards/{id}` - Get a board by ID
- `DELETE /boards/{id}` - Delete a board
- `POST /boards/{id}/tasks` - Create a task on a board
- `GET /boards/{id}/tasks` - List tasks on a board (supports optional `?tag=` filter)
- `GET /boards/{id}/stats` - Get statistics for a board
- `PUT /tasks/{id}` - Update a task
- `DELETE /tasks/{id}` - Delete a task

## Run

```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

## Test

```bash
pytest

This project is used as a benchmark fixture for the Context Platform.

## Description

MiniKanban is a simple REST API for managing kanban boards and tasks. It supports creating boards, adding tasks, tracking task status, and generating statistics.

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI
- Pydantic
- pytest

## Features

### Boards
- Create boards with a name
- Retrieve board details
- Delete boards (cascades to all associated tasks)
- List all tasks on a board
- Get task statistics for a board

### Tasks
- Create tasks on boards with title, status, and tags
- Update task title, status, and tags
- Delete tasks
- Filter tasks by tags
- Valid statuses: `todo`, `doing`, `done`

### Business Rules
- A board must exist before tasks can be created on it
- A task can have at most 5 tags
- Tags must be unique
- A `done` task cannot change its title
- Deleting a board cascade-deletes its tasks
- Filtering by a missing tag returns an empty list, not an error

## Run

```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

## Test

```bash
pytest
```

## API Endpoints

### Boards
- `POST /boards` - Create a new board
- `GET /boards/{id}` - Get a board by ID
- `DELETE /boards/{id}` - Delete a board
- `GET /boards/{id}/tasks` - List tasks on a board (optional `?tag=xxx` filter)
- `GET /boards/{id}/stats` - Get task statistics for a board

### Tasks
- `POST /boards/{id}/tasks` - Create a task on a board
- `PUT /tasks/{id}` - Update a task
- `DELETE /tasks/{id}` - Delete a task","oldString":"# MiniKanban

{"filePath":"C:\Users\zxm\AppData\Local\Temp\ctx-benchmark-fixture-YpWg1N\minikanban\README.md","newString":"# MiniKanban

A lightweight kanban board API built with FastAPI and Pydantic.

## Features

- Create and manage boards
- Create, update, and delete tasks on boards
- Track task status (todo, doing, done)
- Tag tasks for organization
- Filter tasks by tag
- Get board statistics

## Run

```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

## Test

```bash
pytest
```

## API Endpoints

### Boards

#### POST /boards
Create a new board.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "name": "Roadmap"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Roadmap"
}
```

#### GET /boards/{id}
Get a board by ID.

#### DELETE /boards/{id}
Delete a board and all its tasks (cascade delete).

**Response:**
```json
{
  "ok": true
}
```

#### GET /boards/{id}/tasks
List all tasks for a board.

Optional query parameter: `tag` - filter tasks by tag.

#### GET /boards/{id}/stats
Get task statistics for a board.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "todo": 5,
  "doing": 3,
  "done": 10
}
```

### Tasks

#### POST /boards/{board_id}/tasks
Create a new task on a board.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "title": "Implement feature",
  "status": "todo",
  "tags": ["feature", "backend"]
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "board_id": 1,
  "title": "Implement feature",
  "status": "todo",
  "tags": ["feature", "backend"]
}
```

#### PUT /tasks/{id}
Update a task.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "title": "Updated title",
  "status": "doing",
  "tags": ["feature", "backend", "urgent"]
}
```

#### DELETE /tasks/{id}
Delete a task.

## Business Rules

- A board must exist before tasks can be created on it
- A task can have at most 5 tags
- Tags must be unique (no duplicates)
- A task with status "done" cannot have its title changed
- Deleting a board automatically deletes all its tasks
- Filtering by a non-existent tag returns an empty list

## Valid Task Statuses

- `todo` - Task not started
- `doing` - Task in progress
- `done` - Task completed","oldString":"# MiniKanban

{"filePath":"C:\Users\zxm\AppData\Local\Temp\ctx-benchmark-fixture-NkfHRS\minikanban\README.md","newString":"# MiniKanban

A simple Kanban board API built with FastAPI, Pydantic, and pytest.

## Features

- Create and manage boards
- Create and manage tasks on boards
- Track task status (todo, doing, done)
- Tag tasks with labels
- Filter tasks by tags
- View board statistics

## Run

```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

## Test

```bash
pytest
```

## API Routes

### Boards

- `POST /boards` - Create a new board
- `GET /boards/{id}` - Get a board by ID
- `DELETE /boards/{id}` - Delete a board (cascades to tasks)

### Tasks

- `POST /boards/{id}/tasks` - Create a task on a board
- `GET /boards/{id}/tasks` - List tasks on a board (optionally filter by tag)
- `PUT /tasks/{id}` - Update a task
- `DELETE /tasks/{id}` - Delete a task

### Stats

- `GET /boards/{id}/stats` - Get task count by status for a board

## Business Rules

- A board must exist before tasks can be created on it
- A task can have at most 5 tags
- Tags must be unique within a task
- A `done` task cannot change its title
- Deleting a board must cascade-delete its tasks
- Filtering by a missing tag returns an empty list, not an error

## Task Statuses

- `todo` - Task not yet started
- `doing` - Task in progress
- `done` - Task completed","oldString":"# MiniKanban
